title: Rebuild draft as exact copy of live site (Version 145)

requirements.text: Restore all frontend source files to their exact Version 145 (live) state. This includes all pages (HomePage, AboutPage, CouplesPage, MenPage, WomenPage, PricingPage, ContactPage, LegalPage, BaselCouplesLandingPage, ZurichCouplesLandingPage), all layout and shared components (Layout.tsx, CalendlyInlineWidget.tsx), all hooks, utilities, configuration files (tailwind.config.js, index.css, App.tsx), and any other frontend files that exist in the live version. No file should differ from the live production version.

quotes: Build the draft as an exact copy of the live site (Version 145)

acceptanceCriteria: All frontend pages render identically to the live Version 145 site
All routes defined in App.tsx match the live version exactly
Layout, header, footer, and navigation are identical to the live version
All page content (text, structure, components) matches Version 145
Calendly integration and all third-party scripts are configured identically to the live version
Tailwind theme tokens and CSS custom properties match the live version exactly
No empty or stub files remain where the live version has actual content

requirements.text: Restore the backend (backend/main.mo) to its exact Version 145 (live) state, ensuring all data types, CRUD operations, role-based access control, pricing entries, collections, navigation, and user profile logic are identical to the live version.

quotes: Build the draft as an exact copy of the live site (Version 145)

acceptanceCriteria: All backend data types and stable variables match the live Version 145 schema
All CRUD endpoints for entries, collections, pricing, navigation, and user profiles are present and functional
Role-based access control logic is identical to the live version
Blob storage mixin is included and unchanged from the live version

constraints: Do not introduce any new features, redesigns, or changes beyond restoring the exact live Version 145 state
Do not modify immutable frontend paths: frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.ts, frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts, frontend/src/main.tsx, frontend/src/components/ui
All restored content must match the live site exactly — no creative interpretation or improvements
nonGoals: Adding new features or pages not present in Version 145
Redesigning or improving the UI beyond the live version
Changing the backend schema or adding new endpoints
